name: reject_scope_escalation_depth_2
description: SECURITY: depth-2 chain where intermediate is authorized to sub-delegate (identity:delegate on parent) but attempts to grant files:write despite only receiving meeting:attend. Effective scope = intersection = {meeting:attend}. Required scope files:write must be rejected with identity_status=scope_denied.

verify_result.error_reason: scope_denied: required scope "files:write" not in effective delegation scope
